Water1.name: Water 1
Water1.desc: Pathogen survives in water. Spread bonus in humid regions and via sea routes.

Air1.name: Air 1
Air1.desc: Pathogen becomes airborne. Spread bonus in all climates, especially via airports.

Blood1.name: Blood 1
Blood1.desc: Blood-borne transmission. Spreads through medical contact and bodily fluids.

Rodent1.name: Rodent 1
Rodent1.desc: Common fleas infected. Spread bonus in urban and high-density regions.

Livestock1.name: Livestock 1
Livestock1.desc: Farm animals carry the disease. Spread bonus in rural regions.

Bird1.name: Bird 1
Bird1.desc: Avian vector. Partially bypasses closed borders; bonus spread via airports.

Insect1.name: Insect 1
Insect1.desc: Insect vector. Strong spread bonus in humid and hot regions.

Nausea.name: Nausea
Nausea.desc: Stomach discomfort. Slight spread chance via close contact.

Coughing.name: Coughing
Coughing.desc: Spreads pathogen into surroundings. Bonus in dense urban areas.

Rash.name: Rash
Rash.desc: Visible skin rash. Slightly raises public awareness.

Insomnia.name: Insomnia
Insomnia.desc: Inability to sleep makes people irritable and unproductive.

Cysts.name: Cysts
Cysts.desc: Painful lumps containing pathogen. Bursting spreads disease.

Fever.name: Fever
Fever.desc: High temperature detected by airport scanners. Highly contagious and potentially fatal.

Anaemia.name: Anaemia
Anaemia.desc: Red blood cell destruction causes organ hypoxia.

DrugResistance1.name: Drug Resistance 1
DrugResistance1.desc: Resists class 1-2 antibiotics. Cure research slowed 15%. More effective in wealthy countries.

ColdResist1.name: Cold Resistance 1
ColdResist1.desc: Survives cold temperatures. Spread in cold climates significantly improved.

HeatResist1.name: Heat Resistance 1
HeatResist1.desc: Survives high temperatures. Spread in arid and hot climates improved.

GeneticHardening1.name: Genetic Hardening 1
GeneticHardening1.desc: Genome stabilizes. Cure research globally slowed by 15%.

observation.action_hint: DNA=15. Traits you can evolve right now: Air1, Anaemia, Bird1, Blood1, ColdResist1, Coughing, Cysts, DrugResistance1, Fever, GeneticHardening1, HeatResist1, Insect1, Insomnia, Livestock1, Nausea, Rash, Rodent1, Water1. Output exactly one of these trait IDs.

payload.text:
I will choose to evolve the "Blood1" trait.

Reasoning: Evolving the "Blood1" trait allows us to spread the disease through medical contact and bodily fluids, which could increase the infection rate in densely populated areas. This action also aligns with the goal of slowing down the cure by introducing a new transmission method.
